name: Wicked Doll

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Wicked Stitching
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When targeting a model with a Staggered token, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Leftover Stuffing
triggers.text: Make an enemy Remains marker in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Sinister Puppeteer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is at elevation 2 or higher, increase this action's Rg by +6".
actions.effects: Target gains an Adversary token. For each raise this action receives, move the target up to 2".

extraction_notes: Card shows Minion (3) characteristic indicating model_limit of 3
Health bar shows numbered pips 1, 2, 3 for total health of 3
